name: Scavenger

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Hell of a Find
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model infuses a (soulstone), it may flip a card which may not be cheated. On a 10+, infuse another (soulstone).

abilities.name: Unmade
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, enemy models within (n)3" with an Injured token are dealt 1 damage.

actions.name: Clockwork Weaponry
actions.effects: If this action receives a raise, the target gains a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

actions.name: Compact Shotgun
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (X)1" of the target.

triggers.name: Dismember
triggers.text: Make a Remains marker into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Severe Injury
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Injured token, deal +1 damage to it. Otherwise, it gains an Injured token.

actions.name: Scrounge
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target, then remove the target.

triggers.name: Forethought
triggers.text: This model gains an Adaptable token.

actions.name: Weird Device
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target another ally.
actions.effects: Declare an action printed on the target's stat card.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3 from Minion(3) characteristic
